creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 147662
Output of 'make check-plist  stage-qa'

 $ portlint -AC /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework-ride
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
 $ portlint -aC /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework-ride
looks fine.

Other passed tests:
make -D DEVELOPER=yes check-plist stage-qa clean # (output is attached)
port test # from ports-mgmt/porttools

Manually started ride.py makes simple operations like open tests and parts in them, typing in some text etc did not expose any problems. I do not use ride.py extensively now, so no testing in real use...

Sorry, I have no working poudriere, and I know nothing about redports.org.
